goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
The train should 'leave after 11:30' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get 'price'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'boat' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to bishops stortford
The train should leave after 11:30 and should leave on wednesday
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of boat and should be in the centre
Make sure you get address and phone number
